title: Why critics say Trump’s intel chief pick threatens national security

title: Trump's Great American State Fair faces another possible setback
shortDescription: Freedom 250's Great American State Fair hit snags in recent weeks as its 16-day concert series unraveled. Now, some states won't be participating.

title: House blocks spying law that shapes Trump's daily security briefing
shortDescription: The House of Representatives failed to renew FISA Section 702, a surveillance law that allows U.S. spy agencies to collect foreigners' communications.

title: Marjorie Taylor Greene says Trump wants to 'cover up for pedophiles'
shortDescription: Former congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene called those who have failed to release the Epstein files "traitors," and "covering up for pedophiles."

title: 'I love the inflation' comment out of context, Trump and Johnson argue
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said on June 10 'I love the inflation' when asked about the May CPI report. He later told the New York Post it was out of context.

title: Trump vows to hit Iran 'very hard,' take control of oil, gas markets
shortDescription: President Trump on Thursday stepped up his threats on Iran, promising to hit the country "very hard" and seize control of its oil and gas markets.

title: Congress plays ball for charity
shortDescription: The annual game that began in 1901, features Republican congressional members vs Democratic congressional members and raises money for charity.

title: Trump asks for world peace in birthday wish
shortDescription: President Donald Trump revealed his wish ahead of his 80th birthday is "peace for the world" while also saying he will continue attacking Iran "hard."

title: 'Secret' military mission got oil through Strait of Hormuz, Trump says
shortDescription: Trump said in a social media post that the U.S. military helped get 100 million barrels of oil through the strait without Iran's knowledge.

title: Bill Gates tells House committee Epstein tried to blackmail him
